key_findings.arc_anchor: No single arc-activation anchor event (unlike RF-08). Arc ACTIVE by accumulation: 3rd signal (S003, B-009 Aug 2023) activates arc on DARVO-inversion pattern.
key_findings.dominant_mechanism: DARVO-inversion: Melissa systematically projects gaslighting onto Eli across 7+ distinct conflict periods (S001, S002, S003, S005, S006, S009, S010).
key_findings.strongest_evidence: XREF-001 (Level A): ROW-9957 'I'll screenshot this and file for full custody' denied by ROW-9964 'There's no threats' in same cluster (B-027, Jul 19 2025).
key_findings.feb_2026_amplification: S011 (B-030): admitted fact (raised voice) amplified to verbal abuse → traumatized → drinking problem → alcoholism — Level C event rewrite driving Phase C visit-refusal engine through dataset close.
key_findings.phase_c_escalation: Sev-2 signals concentrated in Phase B/C: S006 (Jan 2025), S008 (Jul 2025), S010 (Nov 2025), S011 (Feb 2026). Pattern intensifies with legal/custody pressure.
key_findings.row6819_forward_anchor: ROW-6819 coaching admission undenied at dataset close — Eli's CP2 observation: Melissa's comfort with admission indicates normalized coaching across all subjects.
key_findings.structural_note: RF-09 is not standalone — 8 of 11 signals are RF-09+RF-04 compounds. The gaslighting mechanism in this dataset is the DARVO inversion: Melissa names and attributes to Eli the behavior she is documented engaging in. For Phase 2 synthesis, RF-09 cannot be separated from RF-04 arc analysis.

session_log.notes: RF-09 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch processed (365 messages, Jan 11-Oct 2 2022). Zero primary RF-09 flags — confirms low baseline. CP2 generated. Arc state initialized at CANDIDATE.

arcs_updated: ARC-RF09-001 CANDIDATE→WATCHING (B-005, S002); WATCHING→ACTIVE (B-009, S003); 11 signals added (S001-S011)
session_log.notes: CP2 calibration answers confirmed. 4 addenda applied. Full pass completed B-002 through B-031. 11 primary signals: 7 Sev-1 (S001-S005, S007, S009), 4 Sev-2 (S006, S008, S010, S011). 8 compound patterns (7 RF-09+RF-04; 1 RF-09+RF-05; COMP-RF09-006 triple with RF-08 context). Level A cross-reference pair confirmed: XREF-001 (ROW-9957/ROW-9964 B-027). Key findings: dominant mechanism is DARVO-inversion (accusing Eli of gaslighting across 7+ conflict periods); Feb 2026 amplification sequence is strongest Level C signal; ROW-6819 coaching admission stands undenied. ARC-RF09-001 unresolved at dataset close.
